cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which book Dave ends up with at the end of the semester. There are a few steps here, so I need to track each trade carefully. Let me start by listing out the initial books each person has. At the start: - Alice has Moby Dick - Bob has Ulysses - Claire has The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave has Lolita - Eve has Catch-22 Now, the trades happen in a sequence. Let me go through each one step by step. First trade: Claire and Bob swap books. So after this swap: - Claire, who originally had The Fellowship of the Ring, now has Bob's book, which is Ulysses. - Bob, who had Ulysses, now has Claire's original book, The Fellowship of the Ring. So after first trade: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Ulysses - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Second trade: Claire and Dave swap books. Claire currently has Ulysses, Dave has Lolita. After swapping: - Claire gets Lolita - Dave gets Ulysses Now, after second trade: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Lolita - Dave: Ulysses - Eve: Catch-22 Third trade:
